name: markdown-reader-v0-1
title: Markdown Reader v0.1 — Tauri+React desktop app with interactive Mermaid
description: Single-file desktop markdown reader fixing the universal pain that Mermaid diagrams render as static images. Tauri 2 + React 18 + TS, with svg-pan-zoom inline + lightbox fullscreen for diagrams and images.
creator: hbw
